item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👍Mike Ennis - Building Industry Association of Washington (BIAW)
item.description: Mike Ennis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Building Industry Association of Washington (BIAW).

item.title: ❓Tammy Fellin - Department of Labor & Industries
item.description: Tammy Fellin signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Department of Labor & Industries.

item.title: First reading, referred to Labor & Workplace Standards.
item.description: First reading, referred to Labor & Workplace Standards.
item.guid: 2026-01-12/First reading, referred to Labor & Workplace Standards.

item.title: 👍Jerry VanderWood - AGC and WA Construction Industry Council
item.description: Jerry VanderWood signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent AGC and WA Construction Industry Council.

item.title: 👍💵Carolyn Logue - Associated Builders & Contractors Inland Pacific Chapter
item.description: Carolyn Logue signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Associated Builders & Contractors Inland Pacific Chapter. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: LAWS - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: LAWS - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: LAWS - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.description: LAWS - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.guid: 2026-01-23/LAWS - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-06/Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: 1st substitute bill substituted.
item.description: 1st substitute bill substituted.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 94; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 4.

item.description: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.

item.title: LC - Majority; do pass.
item.description: LC - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 47; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 2.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 47; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 2.

item.description: President signed.

item.title: Speaker signed.
item.description: Speaker signed.

item.title: Delivered to Governor.
item.description: Delivered to Governor.

item.title: Governor signed.
item.description: Governor signed.

item.title: Here are the bills signed into law this week in Washington state | king5.com
